productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Ambition VII Stripes Navy Blue Sports Shoes
description: Ambition VII Stripes from adidas is a stylish add to your shoe closet. Perfect for roughing it out during a trekking trip, braving the city traffic or chilling on the field for a weekend game, this shoe will not disappoint. Upper Synthetic leather upper with perforations on the toe region adidas 3-Stripe on the midfoot Central lace-ups PAdded tongue Padded mesh inner Branding on the tongue and heel collar Midsole Light rubber midsole Outsole Herringbone grooves all over with patterned inlays Shoe care Rub surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
